form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 61-day let-up. First-up after eight months 3rd of 8 at Tampa Bay Downs on February 6 over 1646m, 7 len behind Forged Steel carrying 54.5kg at $10.40. Previously second-up scored a big 6 len win at Aqueduct January 28 2024 over 1811m defeating Memphis with 54.5kg at $1.75. Even fitter and is an excellent winning chance.

form.formComment: At the latest run 2nd of 7 at Parx on March 16 over 1673m, 1.3 len behind All American Rod with 55.5kg at $31.10. The run before that second last in a small field at Parx on January 15 over 1673m, 15 len behind Margie's Fun Son carrying 54kg at $37.10. Capable of another forward showing. Respect.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up got back early 4th in a small field at Laurel on February 20 over 1609m, 10 len behind Jolly By Golly carrying 56kg at $12.80. Second run from a spell 5th of 7 at this track on March 18 over 1609m, 5 len behind Hope's Alive carrying 56kg at $7.50. Beaten comfortably last time out but this suits.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Last outing 3rd in a small field at Colonial Downs on March 14 over 1710m, 3 len behind Maclean's Rook with 55.5kg at $29.30. At only start last preparation 6th of 9 at Parx on December 24 over 1308m, 8 len behind Dr Steve carrying 55.5kg at $24.80. Among the leading chances.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 34-day let-up. At the latest run won by 2.25 len at Parx March 5 over 1673m defeating Kevin's Strike with 55.5kg at $3.90. The race before that raced on the pace when 2nd of 7 at Parx on January 15 over 1673m, 1.0 len behind Devil's Cay carrying 55.5kg at $3.60. Big chance to go back-to-back.
